title: tetragonia perfoliata
intro: Tetragonia perfoliata, also known as New Zealand spinach or kōkihi, is a perennial plant native to New Zealand and parts of Australia, belonging to the Aizoaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tetragonia perfoliata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Tetragonia perfoliata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried leaf supplement, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
